---
title: "Project roadmap"
subtitle: "Operational status of the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice subprojects"
date: 2026-06-10
date-format: iso
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Snapshot of the public [project board](https://github.com/users/JackDMenendez/projects/6), generated **2026-06-10**. 10 items: **2** In Progress · **7** Todo · **1** Done.

This tracks *operational* status of the subprojects. For the status of individual scientific *claims*, see the [claim map](papers/claim-map.qmd).
:::

## In Progress (2)

| Item | Milestone | Labels |
|------|-----------|--------|
| [005 Research Investigation Delta p min.md](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/7) | — | research, investigation |
| [006 Subproject Delta p Min](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/8) | — | subproject, planning |

## Todo (7)

| Item | Milestone | Labels |
|------|-----------|--------|
| [001 Subproject Proving Hilbert's Sixth Problem](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/2) | Provision dcl-paper-03-tidal-ionization (due 2026-05-19) | subproject, planning |
| [002 Subproject Paper III Tidal Ionization](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/3) | — | subproject, planning |
| [004 Subproject dcl Mathematics](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/6) | — | subproject, planning |
| [007 Subproject dcl Core 3D Upgrade](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/9) | — | subproject, planning |
| [010 Make Paper I's substrate structure premise-explicit](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/10) | — | enhancement, paper |
| [008 Research Investigation Lattice Dimensional Family](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/11) | — | research, investigation |
| [009 Research Artifact DIY Lattice Cookbook](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/12) | — | enhancement, research-artifact |

## Done (1)

| Item | Milestone | Labels |
|------|-----------|--------|
| [003 Subproject Geometry Induced Physics Website](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/discrete-causal-lattice-project/issues/4) | — | subproject, planning |

---

*Generated from the GitHub project board by `scripts/update-roadmap.ps1` on 2026-06-10. Do not edit this file by hand — re-run the script.*
